title: MarkedHoppers
description: Adds Arrows To Hoppers That Point In Its Direction.
body:
# MarkedHoppers

Ever placed a hopper the wrong way and wondered why your farm wasn't working? Ever spent five minutes breaking and replacing hoppers, trying to figure out which direction they're all facing? MarkedHoppers fixes that with one simple change.

![hopper example top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9f6405496d4b31dc1999f1bc417e3ba3a422d51.png)

![hopper example side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9b73da4834af3f2182494b3116d6384df34e5f0.png)

## What It Does

MarkedHoppers adds a clear directional arrow to the hopper model, pointing in the exact direction it outputs items. No more guessing. No more breaking and replacing. One glance and you know exactly where your items are headed.
